verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It seems to me this is the day, When men’s hearts in sins are swayed, And their eyes are turning blind Loving sin with all their might.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But as for me I will serve the Lord With all my heart and all my mind Keep looking up to God’s own Word For my comfort there I find. Yes my comfort there I find.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: How glad I am that I’ve been saved From sin and shame that kept me a slave Now I can soar above the world For my strength comes from above.
